"E:\Visual Studio 2026\Common7\IDE\CommonExtensions\Microsoft\CMake\CMake\bin\cmake.exe" -E rm -f CMakeFiles\SRDMonitor.dir/objects.a
D:\Qt5\Tools\mingw730_64\bin\ar.exe qc CMakeFiles\SRDMonitor.dir/objects.a @CMakeFiles\SRDMonitor.dir\objects1.rsp
D:\Qt5\Tools\mingw730_64\bin\g++.exe -g -Wl,--whole-archive CMakeFiles\SRDMonitor.dir/objects.a -Wl,--no-whole-archive -o SRDMonitor.exe -Wl,--out-implib,libSRDMonitor.dll.a -Wl,--major-image-version,0,--minor-image-version,0 @CMakeFiles\SRDMonitor.dir\linkLibs.rsp
